events.title: Cole Porter – Too Darn Hot!

events.summary: Learn about library eBooks and eAudiobooks, as well as how to access them on your compatible device! Call for an appointment during library open hours; please bring your charged device and associated...

events.title: Generative Ai for Healthy Eating
events.summary: Join 55+ volunteer Barbara Fillip for a practical session on using AI to plan balanced meals and support healthy habits. Learn how to use tools like ChatGPT to create recipes, grocery lists and menus while respecting nutrition goals. AI is a coach—not a replacement for health and nutrition professionals. Sponsored by the Alliance for Arlington Senior Programs.

events.title: German Conversation
events.summary: Sprechen Sie Deutsch? Join this cordial group of people with knowledge of the language in a weekly dialogue. Stimulating and sociable gatherings provide lively discussions in German on topics that are easy to discuss and of interest to all. No instruction provided.
events.short_note: Workshop.

events.title: Just Say No to Scams

events.title: Tea and a Movie
events.summary: Join us for Tea and a Movie, where we’re partnering with the Aurora Hills Book Club to screen films that align with the books they’re reading. No need to be a book club member: just come enjoy a cozy atmosphere, a warm cup of tea and a great story brought to life on screen. March 27: Brooklyn (2025) (PG-13). events.title: The Wonders of Woodpeckers
events.summary: Woodpeckers are the caretakers of our trees by removing insects that mean to eat the trees. Come learn about how these tiny (and not-so-tiny) birds can tear apart trees with their sharp and noisy beaks to eat so many insect and not get a headache.
